name: Suspicious File Copying and Renaming in Public Directory
description: Detects the use of file operation commands (`xcopy`, `ren`, `start`) to manipulate files in public directories. This behavior is indicative of malware staging, where benign-looking files are renamed to executable formats and launched, often without user awareness.

filterSets.name: Suspicious File Copying and Renaming in Public Directory

author: Mary Joy Ramos & Lance Albert Mendoza
